title: polyphlebium colensoi
intro: Polyphlebium colensoi, also known as the New Zealand polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polyphlebium colensoi include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
